'''Rian''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Frego]]. Its buildings used a higher frequency of [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolifts]] than most [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
